india_trends.title: Jio Platforms Q4 profit rises 13% as subscriber additions, data usage drive growth
india_trends.summary: Subscriber additions, rising data usage and broadband traction power Jio’s Q4 performance, even as higher finance costs cap profit growth ahead of its planned 2026 IPO.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: COMEX gold down $52/oz, silver slips $1.60/oz on geopolitical uncertainty
india_trends.summary: Precious metals traded lower on 23 April, with gold futures down $52 to $4,672 and silver futures falling $1.60 to $74.23. Market optimism waned as tensions in the Strait of Hormuz persisted, raising inflation concerns and affecting investor interest in non-yielding assets.

india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio reported a rise in ARPU to ₹214 in Q4 FY26, with its subscriber base exceeding 524 million. india_trends.summary: In today's earnings statement for Reliance Industries, Ambani signalled steady progress in the telecom arm's listing, as he said that the company was advancing steadily towards the listing of Jio Platforms.

india_trends.title: Reliance Jio Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 13% YoY to Rs 7,935 crore, revenue rises 13%; ARPU climbs to Rs 214
india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio Q4 Results: The company reported Q4FY26 revenue of Rs 38,259 crore, which was up by 13% over Rs 33,986 crore posted by the company in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.

india_trends.title: Silver surge, weak rupee drive 67% jump in Hindustan Zinc Q4 profit
india_trends.summary: Higher silver realizations, currency tailwinds and stronger volumes lifted Q4 earnings, even as output mix shifts towards zinc and silver production lagged guidance.
